extraction.one_line_summary: QUINTANA attacked repeatedly on final climb, dropped THOMAS and YATES, caught lone leader ŠPILAK to win solo and secure GC.
tactical_patterns: QUINTANA deployed multiple accelerations on final climb, wearing down THOMAS before definitive attack caught ŠPILAK.
THOMAS rode in team/tempo mode when YATES and URÁN were present, only responding to QUINTANA directly.
ŠPILAK attacked three times earlier on climb achieving solo break before being caught by GC riders.

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Multiple accelerations on climb showed exceptional early-season form, effortless out-of-saddle style destroying rivals
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Developing real GC capability, repeatedly gapped YATES and URÁN but couldn't match QUINTANA's final surge
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Repeatedly put into difficulty by THOMAS accelerations, unable to stay with front group on steep gradients
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: neutral: Sat on THOMAS wheel but resurgent, lacked punch to follow QUINTANA attacks
rider_signals.ŠPILAK Simon: neutral: Three early accelerations gained solo lead but died when caught by fresh QUINTANA from chasing group
